data.title: ARK Invest increased its holdings of Coinbase and Bitcoin ETF in the first quarter and reduced its holdings of Tesla
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In the first quarter, the total market value of the holdings of ARK, the Ark Investment Fund led by "Wood Sister", was US$9.99 billion, and the top ten holdings accounted for 48.49% of the total market value. "Wood Sister"'s holding strategy in the first quarter showed an active layout in the fields of emerging technologies and biotechnology, while adjusting and optimizing some holdings. In the first quarter, ARK increased its holdings in AI (Palantir, UiPath), blockchain (Coinbase, Bitcoin ETF), and biotechnology (CRISPR, Teladoc), and reduced its holdings in Tesla (intensified competition) and Zoom (slowing growth). Although Tesla is still the largest holding, accounting for 8.45% of the portfolio, the size of holdings decreased slightly by 0.87% in the first quarter, which is the third consecutive quarter that Tesla has been reduced. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale deposited 200,355 LINK worth $3.27 million to Binance in the past two days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, after 9 months of silence, a whale deposited 200,355 LINK worth $3.27 million to Binance in the past 2 days, making a profit of $1.08 million. 9 months ago, the whale received 345,786 LINK worth $4.56 million, and currently his wallet still holds 145,430 LINK worth $2.37 million.

data.title: Whale Resurfaces with Significant LINK Deposit After Dormancy
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a cryptocurrency whale has recently made a notable transaction after a nine-month hiatus. The whale deposited 200,355 LINK tokens, valued at approximately $3.27 million, into a centralized exchange (CEX). This transaction resulted in a profit of $1.08 million.

Nine months ago, the whale had accumulated 345,786 LINK tokens for a total of $4.56 million. The whale's wallet still holds 145,430 LINK tokens, which are currently valued at around $2.37 million.

data.title: Data: clUSDL stablecoin TVL exceeds $100 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Data from DeFiLlama shows that Coinshift's yield-based stablecoin clUSDL has exceeded $100 million in total locked value (TVL) just four months after its launch in January this year, indicating the market's growing demand for fiat-pegged assets that provide passive income through decentralized financial protocols. clUSDL is built on Ethereum, earning income through on-chain lending and U.S. Treasury exposure and built on USDL, a stablecoin issued by Paxos International and regulated by Abu Dhabi. (The Block)

data.title: The first phase of Gate.io Launchpad project PFVS ended, with the total subscription exceeding 656 million USDT, exceeding the subscription by 938 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The first phase of Gate.io Launchpad project Puffverse (PFVS) has now been successfully completed, attracting more than 35,000 participants, with a total subscription amount of 656,514,966 USDT, which has been oversubscribed by 938 times.

data.title: CF Benchmarks: Ethereum bear market is over
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CF Benchmarks CEO Sui Chung said that Ethereum's recent price increase was mainly driven by short covering rather than the entry of new long funds. He pointed out that the CME Ethereum futures premium is still low, and the US-listed spot Ethereum ETF has not seen significant inflows, which indicates that the current rise is more due to traders closing short positions rather than active positioning by institutional investors. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Ethereum's Recent Price Surge Driven by Short Covering, Says CF Benchmarks CEO
data.description: According to Odaily, CF Benchmarks CEO Sui Chung has attributed the recent rise in Ethereum's price primarily to short covering rather than new bullish investments. He highlighted that the CME Ethereum futures premium remains low, and there has been no significant capital inflow into U.S.-listed spot Ethereum ETFs. This suggests that the current price increase is largely due to traders closing short positions rather than active positioning by institutional investors.

data.title: Trump Predicts Positive Developments in the Coming Month
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has announced that many positive developments are expected to occur within the next month.

data.title: World Liberty Financial Faces Significant Losses in Cryptocurrency Investments
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump's cryptocurrency initiative, World Liberty Financial (WLFI), has made substantial investments in various digital assets. The portfolio has spent approximately 347 million USDT to acquire 12 different tokens, including ETH, WBTC, TRX, LINK, AAVE, ENA, MOVE, ONDO, SEI, AVAX and EOS. The total value of these investments is estimated to be around 291 million USD, resulting in an overall unrealized loss of about 53.07 million USD.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Seeks New Catalyst for Price Surge
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Trade Nation analyst David Morrison has indicated in a report that the cryptocurrency sector is searching for a new catalyst to drive significant price increases. Morrison noted that as traders continue to assess the broader risk environment, the market sentiment remains cautiously optimistic. Recently, Bitcoin's price has rebounded from its April lows and is currently fluctuating between $101,000 and $105,000.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints Over 92 Million USDC on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert reported that at 19:55 UTC+8, the USDC Treasury minted 92,435,120 USDC on the Ethereum blockchain. This amount is equivalent to approximately $92,416,679.

data.title: PitchBook: Crypto startup financing is expected to reach $18 billion in 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Venture capital research firm PitchBook predicts that crypto startups will attract about $18 billion in venture capital funds in 2025, an increase of about 50% from 2024. PitchBook analyst Robert Le said that macroeconomic stability, increased institutional adoption, and the return of ordinary venture investors will drive this growth. So far, crypto projects in 2025 have raised about $7.4 billion, an increase of 85% over the same period in 2024. This week, six projects raised a total of nearly $35 million, showing an increase in market activity. (DL News)

data.title: Abraxas Capital withdraws 2,300 ETH from Binance, bringing the total amount of ETH withdrawn from exchanges since May 7 to 278,639
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchian monitoring, Abraxas Capital is still accumulating ETH. In the past 21 minutes, it has withdrawn 2,300 ETH from Binance, worth US$6.04 million. Since May 7, it has withdrawn 278,639 ETH from the exchange, worth approximately US$655 million, with unrealized profits of US$77 million.

data.title: Abraxas Capital Accumulates Ethereum with Significant Unrealized Profit
data.description: According to Foresight News, monitoring by Lookonchain reveals that Abraxas Capital has been steadily accumulating Ethereum (ETH) since May 7. The firm has withdrawn a total of 278,639 ETH from exchanges at an average price of $2,350 per coin. This acquisition is valued at approximately $655 million. Currently, Abraxas Capital holds an unrealized profit of $77 million from these transactions.

data.title: CFTC Acting Chair Caroline Pham to Depart for Private Sector
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Caroline Pham, the acting chair of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), is set to leave her position later this year to return to the private sector. Pham confirmed her departure during the International Swaps and Derivatives Association (ISDA) annual meeting held in Amsterdam on Thursday. Her resignation will be formalized once Brian Quintenz is confirmed as the new CFTC chair.

data.title: BlackRock and Strategy hold nearly 1.2 million bitcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to position data, the total number of bitcoins held by BlackRock and Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) has reached nearly 1.2 million, of which Strategy holds approximately 568,840 bitcoins and BlackRock IBIT holds approximately 627,985 bitcoins.

data.title: BlackRock and Strategy's Bitcoin Holdings Near 1.2 Million
data.description: According to Odaily, recent data on holdings reveal that BlackRock and Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy, collectively possess nearly 1.2 million Bitcoins. Strategy holds approximately 568,840 Bitcoins, while BlackRock's IBIT accounts for around 627,985 Bitcoins.

data.title: Initia: 93% of airdropped tokens have been claimed, and there are currently about 3.4 million INITs to be claimed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Initia posted on the X platform that there are still eight days left before the deadline for airdrop collection. So far, 93% of the airdrop tokens have been collected, but there are still about 3.4 million INITs to be claimed.

data.title: Planet Evening News
Stablecoin Adoption Grows Among Institutional Players, Report Reveals
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, a recent report by Fireblocks, a digital assets platform, indicates that 90% of institutional entities are either utilizing or considering the use of stablecoins in their operations. The report, released on May 15, surveyed 295 executives from traditional banks, financial institutions, fintech companies, and payment gateways. It revealed that nearly half of the respondents, 49%, are already employing stablecoins for payments, while 23% are conducting pilot tests, and another 18% are in the planning stages. Only 10% of the institutions surveyed remain undecided about adopting stablecoins.

The report highlights that the adoption of stablecoins has become crucial for institutions to avoid obsolescence as customer demand increases and use cases evolve. Traditional banks, in particular, are prioritizing cross-border payments as a primary use case for stablecoins. These digital assets offer a strategic solution to the inefficiencies of traditional cross-border systems, which are often plagued by high costs and delays. The report found that 58% of traditional banks are using stablecoins for cross-border payments, while 28% use them to accept payments. Additionally, 12% of banks employ stablecoins to optimize liquidity, and 9% use them for merchant settlement and B2B invoicing.

Fireblocks noted that banks view stablecoins as a path to modernization, as their fiat-pegged nature allows for easier integration into existing treasury workflows. This integration helps banks reclaim market share from fintech companies and reduce capital lock-up. The survey also revealed that speed is the most significant benefit of stablecoin use, with 48% of respondents citing faster settlement as a key advantage. Other benefits include greater transparency, improved liquidity management, integrated payment flows, and enhanced security. Meanwhile, lower transaction costs were the least cited benefit among participants. As the financial landscape continues to evolve, stablecoins are becoming an essential tool for institutions seeking to maintain competitiveness and meet customer expectations.
